raw_transcript_text:
DOCTOR: Namaste! Kaise hain aap? Aaj kitne months ho gaye?

PATIENT: Namaste doctor sahab. Main theek hoon. Yeh aathwan month chal raha hai.

DOCTOR: Theek hai, theek hai. Aaaiye baithiye. Pehle aapka BP check karte hain. Haan, thoda relax ho jaiye.

PATIENT: Jee.

DOCTOR: BP hai... 130/86. Theek hai. Normal range mein hai. Pulse bhi dekhte hain. 78 hai. Sab normal. Temperature? Haan, 98.4. Koi problem feel kar rahi hain aap?

PATIENT: Doctor sahab, haan ek problem hai. Pichhle do din se pairon mein aur haathon mein halls toh hain, lekin saans lene mein bhi dikkat hoti hai. Raat ko neend bhi nahi aati theek se.

DOCTOR: Hmm, theek hai. Yeh pregnancy ke aakhri months mein common hota hai, par saans ki problem ko seriously lena chahiye. Chaliye, aapko examine karte hain. Pehle pet dekhte hain.

PATIENT: Jee.

DOCTOR: Fundal height 32 weeks ke hisaab se theek hai. Baby ka head down hai. Heartbeat normal hai, 140 per minute. Theek hai, ab sunte hain aapke chest ko. Do saans andar-bahar karein.

PATIENT: Jee.

DOCTOR: (After listening) Haan, lungs clear hain, no crepitations. Koi swelling to nahi hai? Haan aapne bataya. Chaliye, aapka weight check karte hain... 70 kilograms. Pichhli baar 68 tha, toh do kilo badh gaya. Thoda zyada hai, but manageable hai.

PATIENT: Doctor sahab, kya paani kam ho gaya? Aur vitamin bhi chahiye na?

DOCTOR: Nahi, paani kam nahi hua. Amniotic fluid normal hai. Aur haan, aap jo medicines le rahi hain, woh continue karein. Kya le rahi hain abhi?

PATIENT: Haan, doctor, aapne Ecosprin 75 mg aur Shelcal diya tha. Aur kuch nahi.

DOCTOR: Theek hai. Ab aapko thoda aur add karna padega. Saans ki problem ke liye Metolar 25 mg ek tablet raat ko soone se pehle le lijiye, do hafte ke liye. Aur sugar bhi check karna padega. Shaayad aapko gestational hai. Main ek test likh raha hoon.

PATIENT: Ji, sugar toh abhi tak normal tha.

DOCTOR: Haan, but pregnancy mein kuch bhi ho sakta hai. Chinta ki baat nahi hai. Aapko Glycomet 500 mg bhi dena padega, khaane ke baad, agar sugar high nikli. Test kar lenge pehle.

PATIENT: Ek aur baat doctor sahab, kabhi kabhi pet mein jalan hoti hai. Kya le sakti hoon?

DOCTOR: Hmm, acidity hai. Isliye main Pan-D 40 mg subah khaali pet de raha hoon, ek hafte ke liye. Aur haan, akhri mahine mein dhyan rakhiye. Aaram karein, paani zyada piyein, aur chai-kahwa kam karein.

PATIENT: Theek hai doctor sahab. Aur koi test?

DOCTOR: Haan, ek urine test aur blood sugar fasting aur post lunch. Aaj hi karwa lijiye. Aur agle hafte phir aaiye, tab dekh lenge. Koi baat nahi, sab theek hoga. Aap tension mat lo.

PATIENT: Thank you doctor.

DOCTOR: Theek hai, ye raha aapka prescription.

---

**Prescription:**

1. Tab Ecosprin 75 mg — 1 tablet daily at night (continue)
2. Tab Shelcal 500 mg — 1 tablet twice daily (continue)
3. Tab Metolar 25 mg — 1 tablet at night for 14 days
4. Tab Pan-D 40 mg — 1 tablet empty stomach for 7 days
5. Tab Glycomet 500 mg — 1 tablet after lunch if needed (start only if sugar is high)
6. Investigations: Urine routine, Fasting Blood Sugar, Post Lunch Blood Sugar (do today)
7. Follow-up: 1 week, with reports

soap_note.subjective: Patient is a 32-week pregnant female (Gravida 1, Para 0) presenting with complaints of swelling in feet and hands (pedal edema and hand edema) for 2 days, associated with dyspnea and insomnia. She also reports occasional epigastric burning sensation (heartburn/pyrosis). She denies any history of hypertension, diabetes, or other comorbidities. She is currently taking Ecosprin 75 mg and Shelcal 500 mg.
soap_note.objective: Vitals: BP 130/86, Pulse 78/min, Temperature 98.4°F. Weight 70 kg (increase of 2 kg from previous visit). Fundal height appropriate for 32 weeks, fetal head down, fetal heart rate 140/min. Chest auscultation: lungs clear, no crepitations. Mild pedal and hand edema noted.
soap_note.assessment: 1. Primigravida at 32 weeks of gestation. 2. Pregnancy-induced hypertension? (BP 130/86, borderline). 3. Gestational diabetes mellitus? (polyhydramnios risk? to be evaluated). 4. Physiological dyspnea of pregnancy versus early pulmonary edema? (lungs clear, no crepitations). 5. Pedal edema and hand edema – likely pregnancy-related. 6. Heartburn – gastroesophageal reflux disease of pregnancy.
soap_note.plan: 1. Continue Ecosprin 75 mg once daily at night. 2. Continue Shelcal 500 mg twice daily. 3. Start Metolar 25 mg once daily at night for 14 days for dyspnea. 4. Start Pan-D 40 mg once daily empty stomach for 7 days for heartburn. 5. Start Glycomet 500 mg once daily after lunch if blood sugar is elevated (await test results). 6. Investigations: Urine routine, Fasting Blood Sugar, Post Lunch Blood Sugar – to be done today. 7. Follow-up in 1 week with reports.
